title: BrandKit
description: A Brand Kit containing centralized brand identity assets and AI configuration.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the Brand Kit.

name.description: Display name of the Brand Kit.

description.description: Description of the Brand Kit's purpose and scope.

organization_uid.description: UID of the organization that owns the Brand Kit.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Brand Kit was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Brand Kit was last updated.
